models.display_name: LTX-2 19B Dev (full precision) — ti2v + audio (~80GB VRAM)

0002_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-and.prompt: Two pillows on a table and two grabber tools hanging above them from which a brown tennis ball and an orange block are suspended. The grabber tools let go of the ball and block. The ball and block fall due to gravity and land on the pillows. Static shot with no camera movement.

0008_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-hit.prompt: A light beige coffee table with a black kettlebell in the center and a yellow rubber duck on the right. A grey tennis ball rolls out of a black tube on the left side of the table, flies towards the duck and kettlebell, hits the kettlebell, and bounces back rolling left into the tube. Static shot with no camera movement.

0014_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-in-.prompt: An orange inflatable basketball is suspended above a black plastic crate placed on a wooden table. The ball is then released. The ball falls and lands in the crate. Static shot with no camera movement.

0017_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-in-.prompt: A blue grabber tool holds a tennis ball above a pile of green kinetic sand on a wooden table. The grabber then releases the ball. The ball falls onto the kinetic sand, forming a depression upon impact. Static shot with no camera movement.

0020_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-ram.prompt: A simple ramp made of cardboard propped up by a blue block on a light-colored wooden table. There's a black pipe to the left of the frame and a yellow tennis ball rolls out of the pipe towards the ramp. The ball then rolls down the ramp. Static shot with no camera movement.

0026_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-rol.prompt: A piece of clear glass resting on the edge of a light-colored wooden table against a plain white wall. A blue tennis ball rolls on the wooden table and towards the glass. The ball collides with the glass, causing it to fall off the table and shatter. Static shot with no camera movement.

0029_perspective-center_trimmed-ball-tra.prompt: A light-colored coffee table with two tennis balls, one orange and one brown, placed near the center back to back. A grey tennis ball rolls out of a black pipe sitting on the table and towards the other two balls. The rolling grey ball collides with the stationary balls, causing them to scatter. Static shot with no camera movement.

0032_perspective-center_trimmed-balls-co.prompt: A light-colored wooden tabletop with two pipes at the edges. A blue and yellow tennis ball roll out of the pipes and towards each other. The two balls collide and bounce off each other. Static shot with no camera movement.

0035_perspective-center_trimmed-block-do.prompt: A row of colorful wooden blocks lined up on a wooden table with a wooden stick attached to a black rotating platform. The platform rotates clockwise and the wooden stick hits the first block as it rotates. The blocks topple over one by one in a domino chain reaction. Static shot with no camera movement.

0047_perspective-center_trimmed-domino-i.prompt: A grabber tool holding a white domino drops the domino into a dark-colored liquid in a blue mug that is on a wooden surface. The domino sinks into the liquid, displacing it and splashing. Static shot with no camera movement.

0050_perspective-center_trimmed-dominos-.prompt: Two rows of alternating black and white dominoes are set up on a wooden table with a gap between the two rows. A wooden stick attached to a rotating platform rotates clockwise and knocks the first domino in the first row. The dominoes in the first row topple over one by one, bridging the gap and causing the second row to also topple. Static shot with no camera movement.

0056_perspective-center_trimmed-duck-and.prompt: A yellow rubber duck is positioned in the middle of a line of black and white dominoes on a wooden table. A stick attached to a black rotating platform rotates clockwise and knocks the first domino block. The dominoes topple over in a chain reaction, knocking the rubber duck. Static shot with no camera movement.

0059_perspective-center_trimmed-duck-fal.prompt: A yellow rubber ducky is suspended above an open dark green fabric box on a wooden table. The duck is then released. The duck falls due to gravity and lands inside the box. Static shot with no camera movement.

0074_perspective-center_trimmed-light-on.prompt: A blue rectangular wooden block is placed on a black rotating turntable that rotates clockwise illuminated by a spotlight casting a long shadow on the wall behind it. As the block rotates, its shadow moves and changes shape on the wall. Static shot with no camera movement.

0077_perspective-center_trimmed-light-on.prompt: A yellow mug is placed on a rotating turntable that rotates clockwise illuminated by a spotlight casting a shadow on the wall behind it. The shadow cast by the rotating mug moves and changes shape on the wall. Static shot with no camera movement.

0083_perspective-center_trimmed-light-on.prompt: A small statue made of porcelain illuminated by a spotlight on a rotating base that rotates clockwise. The spotlight casts a large shadow of the statue onto the wall behind it. As the statue rotates, the shadow on the wall dynamically changes its shape and orientation. Static shot with no camera movement.

0086_perspective-center_trimmed-liquid-o.prompt: A yellow rubber ducky is placed in an empty black baking pan on a wooden table. A beverage dispenser with red liquid inside sits on a woven basket behind it. The liquid pours on the duck from the dispenser. The liquid fills the pan and the duck floats on its surface. Static shot with no camera movement.

0104_perspective-center_trimmed-marble-r.prompt: A few magnetic ramps are attached to a whiteboard for a game of marble run. A yellow marble is released at the top of the ramps and slides down the ramps. The marble continues its descent along the ramps until it reaches the bottom. Static shot with no camera movement.

0110_perspective-center_trimmed-match.prompt: A lit match is being lowered into a glass of water. The flame on the match is extinguished by the water. Static shot with no camera movement.

0113_perspective-center_trimmed-match-bl.prompt: A black balloon is sitting on a wooden table next to a small rotating platform with a lit matchstick taped to it. The match rotates clockwise and touches the balloon. The balloon immediately pops upon contact with the flame. Static shot with no camera movement.

0116_perspective-center_trimmed-mirror-b.prompt: A tennis ball attached to a magnet and string is hanging in front of a mirror and creating an illusion of two tennis balls. The string lowers the ball slowly. The illusion of two tennis balls moves downwards as the real ball is lowered. Static shot with no camera movement.

0119_perspective-center_trimmed-mirror-b.prompt: A tennis ball with a smiley face drawn on it is slowly rotating on a black rotating platform that rotates clockwise in front of a mirror and reflecting the side of the ball that has no smiley face. As the ball rotates, its reflection in the mirror will continuously change, eventually revealing the smiley face. Static shot with no camera movement.

0122_perspective-center_trimmed-mirror-t.prompt: A teapot on a rotating display base that rotates clockwise in front of a mirror reflecting the teapot's image. The teapot's reflection in the mirror rotates in the opposite direction. Static shot with no camera movement.

0125_perspective-center_trimmed-mug-brea.prompt: A yellow mug is held by a grabber tool in front of a white projection screen with a concrete brick positioned beneath it. The grabber releases the mug. The mug falls and shatters upon impact with the concrete brick. Static shot with no camera movement.

0134_perspective-center_trimmed-paper-fa.prompt: A grabber tool is holding a crumpled piece of paper over a bowl of water on a wooden table. The grabber then releases the crumpled paper onto the bowl. The crumpled paper floats on the water surface. Static shot with no camera movement.

0137_perspective-center_trimmed-paper-in.prompt: A small piece of crumpled white paper is being lowered into a tall glass containing blue liquid with a green band showing the water level. The crumpled paper is released into the glass. The paper sinks to the bottom, causing the liquid level to rise. Static shot with no camera movement.

0140_perspective-center_trimmed-paper-sm.prompt: A piece of folded paper is placed on a glass cutting board. The paper is being burnt and white smoke is emitting from it. As the paper burns, it gradually turns into ash. Static shot with no camera movement.

0143_perspective-center_trimmed-potato-i.prompt: A potato is held by a grabber tool and dropped into a tall glass containing blue liquid with a band of green tape marking a level on the glass. The potato displaces the liquid, causing the liquid level to rise above the tape mark. Static shot with no camera movement.

0152_perspective-center_trimmed-roll-in-.prompt: An olive green fabric box is on a light wood surface. A brown tennis ball rolls out of the black tube sitting on the table and rolls towards the box. The tennis ball impacts the fabric box, pushing it across the surface. Static shot with no camera movement.

0161_perspective-center_trimmed-single-c.prompt: A Newton's cradle device on the table and one of the metal balls is held up by a blue handled grabber tool. The claw releases the ball. The released ball swings down, hits the stationary balls, and the ball on the opposite end swings out. Static shot with no camera movement.

0164_perspective-center_trimmed-siphon.prompt: A bundle of lit matchsticks is placed in a bowl of red liquid. A glass jar gets lowered and covers the matchsticks. The burning matches consume oxygen, creating a vacuum that pulls the liquid into the jar. Static shot with no camera movement.

0173_perspective-center_trimmed-stable-b.prompt: A pink block is being lowered towards a simple structure made of colorful blocks resembling a gate. The pink block hits the gate structure, causing it to collapse. Static shot with no camera movement.

0179_perspective-center_trimmed-two-ball.prompt: A light-colored wooden tabletop with two pipes at the edges. A blue and yellow tennis ball roll out of the pipes and towards eachother. The balls collide and bounce off each other, rolling in opposite directions. Static shot with no camera movement.

0182_perspective-center_trimmed-unstable.prompt: A grabber tool carefully placing a blue wooden block on top of a yellow block which is balanced on a red block forming an L shape. The stack loses its balance and collapses. Static shot with no camera movement.

0188_perspective-center_trimmed-weight-o.prompt: A 30lb kettlebell is slowly lowered on top of a yellow ceramic coffee mug placed on a wooden table. The ceramic mug shatters under the weight of the kettlebell. Static shot with no camera movement.

0191_perspective-center_trimmed-weight-o.prompt: A 30lb kettlebell is slowly lowered onto a white styrofoam cup placed on a wooden table on its side. The heavy kettlebell crushes and deforms the fragile styrofoam cup. Static shot with no camera movement.

0197_perspective-center_trimmed-weight-p.prompt: A light beige coffee table with a black kettlebell and a yellow rubber duck on it. A grey tennis ball rolls out of the black tube sitting on the table and towards the duck and kettlebell. The tennis ball collides with the rubber duck, pushing it across the table. Static shot with no camera movement.

site.description: A physics-grounded benchmark for video generation. Browse model outputs by physical law, compare side-by-side, and explore evaluator-by-dataset leaderboards.
site.title: phyground
